title: Assam Cops At Pawan Khera's Home Amid Himanta Sarma's Wife's Passport Row
description: Pawan Khera, the chief of Congress' Media and Publicity Department, had in a press conference on Sunday alleged that Himanta Sarma's wife, Riniki Bhuyan Sharma, owns three passports and that the family has business interests worth Rs 52,000 crore in
